title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 65.450 - Procurement of books and stationery
text:
65.450.  Procurement of books and stationery. — The township clerk shall procure, under the direction of the township board, and at the expense of the township, all necessary record books and other books and stationery for the use of the township.
(RSMo 1939 § 13975, A.L. 1957 p. 322) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12298; 1919 § 13211; 1909 § 11699
